---
name: 💡 Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / Motivation
What problem does this feature solve? Who would benefit from it?

## Proposed Solution
A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered
What other solutions did you consider? Why did you rule them out?

## Additional Context
Screenshots, mockups, or examples from other tools that do something similar.

---
> For large or breaking features, please open a Discussion first before submitting a PR.
